endpoints.name: GET /v3/urlNotifications/metadata
endpoints.description: Gets metadata about a Web Document. This method can _only_ be used to query URLs that were previously seen in successful Indexing API notifications. Includes the latest `UrlNotification` received via this API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/urlNotifications:publish
endpoints.description: Notifies that a URL has been updated or deleted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
